outcome.discovery: The dominant failure was 'source migrated to jakarta.*, pom still on javax.*', causing the post-Java-21 compile to fail with cannot-find-symbol.

iterations.label: smoke-jakartaee10
iterations.mutation_from_iter_0: replace JavaxMigrationToJakarta with JakartaEE10 (broader EE10 umbrella that also bumps pom artefacts)
harness_changes: configured Google Maven Central mirror via settings.xml to defeat 429 rate limit
added Qwen 3.6 27B FP8 judge (qwen_judge.py) scoring 4-axis rubric over the diff

results.summary: Recipe migrated to Java 21 + Spring 6.1 + Hibernate 6.5 + JakartaEE10 deps; replaced @Autowired field injection with constructor injection; SpringJUnit4ClassRunner -> SpringJUnitConfig; used List.getFirst(). Build fails on a stray org.springframework.boot.sql.init.dependency.DependsOnDatabaseInitialization import added by a Boot-specific recipe firing on a Spring-framework-only project.

Boot 2.3 -> 3.x, Spring Cloud bump, Swagger -> SpringDoc, Cassandra driver update, javax -> jakarta, @Serial on serialVersionUID, lambda DSL for SecurityWebFilterChain. Retains some legacy patterns (per-controller @CrossOrigin instead of global CORS, manual tracing log pattern) and minor formatting inconsistencies.

FAKE WIN. Poms pin source/target=7 which JDK 21 javac rejects. Baseline fails, recipe fails before doing anything, but post-build 'passes' via the -Dmaven.compiler.release=21 compat flag. Qwen empty-diff branch correctly flags it as 1/5.

key_findings: Qwen judge separates honest 4/5 progress from build-pass fakes -- this is the right discriminator for the user's 'high-quality conversion' fitness.
JakartaEE10 strictly improves over JavaxMigrationToJakarta on Boot/Spring stacks (pom artefacts carried along).
Boot-only recipes (UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3) fire on Spring-framework-only repos and inject Boot-only classes that don't exist there.
Stale source levels (source=7) survive our compat flags and produce ghost wins.

iterations.label: smoke-framework-vs-boot-split
iterations.mutation_from_iter_1: add UpgradeSpringFramework_6_1 (for non-Boot Spring repos) and UpgradeJavaVersion(21) (forces pom source/target >= 8); keep JakartaEE10, UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3, Hibernate62, JUnit5+Mockito.
iterations.corpus: smoke: jakarta-j17-3-CAVEAT, sb2-j11-1, jakarta-j8-1, hjl-j8-3, hjl-j17-2

stop_criterion: 3 consecutive iterations with mean fitness improvement < 0.02
current_best_seed: iter-1 (mean qwen_overall_excluding_fake = 4.0 on 2 of 3 smoke; 0 of 3 build_post=1 honestly)
